messages.message: Parameter #1 $callback of method Illuminate\Support\Collection<int,App\Models\Import>::map() contains unresolvable type.

Parameter #1 $collection of method Illuminate\Pagination\AbstractPaginator<int,App\Models\Import>::setCollection() expects Illuminate\Support\Collection<int, App\Models\Import>, Illuminate\Support\Collection<int, array{id: int, name: string, financial_entity: mixed, payment_service: mixed, url: string, created_at: string, status: string, extension: string}> given.
Return type of call to method Illuminate\Support\Collection<int,App\Models\Import>::map() contains unresolvable type.
Property App\Models\Import::$url (string) does not accept null.
Property 'url' is not a computed property, remove from $appends.
